chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-38 0{ 2024 ٥at٤ OrUEI with signature of Joge For orders on office oblection For hearing of main case 29.02.2024 Mr, Mir Ali Nawaz Talpur, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider 'Ada', DAG ٧ 7 ٥ ٠٠٠٠٦+٠ Syed Mujahid Ali Shah advocate has filed Vakalatnama behalf of Respondents No 7 & 8, which is taken on record _ Petitioner 5 Counsel submits that private Respondents have started J asullying campaign against the petitioner on social media order to prove the same, he has submitted screenshots in the file He further submits that he has moved an application to Director, FIA but he has not taken any action against him Learned DAG undertakes that application Of the petitioner would accordingly be decided and if respondents are found guilty, an action in accordance with law would be taken against them Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied a٨٥ this petition Is accordingly disposed of
